context: Sites other than:   nodal (see below) Frequency:   NHL (in 20-40%); Hodgkin disease (4-5%) CT: √  discrete round well-defined homogeneous solid nodules in focal / multifocal disease √  ± heterogeneous appearance ← central necrosis √  mild uniform contrast enhancement US: √  homogeneously hypoechoic nodules resembling cysts √  ± bull's-eye appearance √  absence of posterior acoustic enhancement MR: √  nodules of low to intermediate SI on T1WI + moderately high SI on T2WI √  moderate uniform contrast enhancement DDx:   metastases, primary cancer, infection, granulomatous disease CT / MR: √  NO s
